title: rhododendron aureum subsp. hypopitys
intro: Rhododendron aureum subsp. hypopitys, also known as the golden rhododendron, is a subspecies of evergreen shrub native to the mountainous regions of the Himalayas. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Rhododendron aureum subsp. hypopitys include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
